sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53607" key="kasko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κασκός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n53607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">little finger</tr_>, Id. (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κακκόρ</foreign>). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κάσμορος·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δύστηνος</foreign>, Id.; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κάμμορος</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
